logs.notes: Completed premium Settings Page with Focus, Audio, Profile Account details, Aesthetics/Theme selection, and Data privacy tabs, fully integrated with Supabase and localStorage.
Implemented custom color assignment for focus tags with real-time donut chart sync, interactive segments, cloud persistence via Supabase tag_colors, and an elegant Zen Tag Color settings manager.

Fixed root cause of 'focus time today/all time not updating'. Solved RLS block in the Cloudflare Worker's Supabase REST fallback by passing down the user authHeader. This ensures the worker can fetch focus_sessions data successfully, computing totals and avoiding cache resets to 0. Also wired up missing edge-computed fields like 'todayFocusSeconds' inside analyticsCache to optimize frontend computation.
Completed implementation of user-defined tag creation, 6-tag limits, atomic delete/migration, edge sync, and resolved Tag Analytics Widget color consistency and dashboard layout adjustments.

Full principal-engineer infrastructure audit. Identified 3 root causes of stats mismatch: (1) sessionsToday used all sessions vs validSessions for focus time, (2) toLocalISO was local-time in client but UTC in worker, (3) secure_log_focus_session RPC missing p_tag param silently dropping session tags. Identified 18 additional red flags including mana lost-update race, get_mega_sync_data N×M query pattern, missing indexes, and D1 eventual consistency risks. See infrastructure_audit.md.

P0 fixes deployed: (1) sessionsToday/completedToday now use validSessions filter in worker.ts. (2) toLocalISO in analyticsCache.ts and analytics.ts standardized to UTC via toISOString(). (3) secure_log_focus_session RPC updated in Supabase DB to accept p_tag DEFAULT NULL — tags now stored on every session log.

Unified aggregation pipeline (aggregation.ts) for identical metrics on client/worker. Implemented atomic complete_focus_session() RPC to insert sessions, upsert streaks, update profiles in 1 transaction. Rewrote spend_mana() atomically. Added index CONCURRENTLY to focus_sessions and streaks. Fixed heartbeat dependency array in ZenClockContext.

Resolved profile bio persistence failure by invalidating the edge/in-memory cache on update. Hardened habits frequency field validation with 1-7 limits and a premium error helper text, locking save/confirm button.

Replaced music icon in ZenClock with a settings gear icon. Implemented a beautiful glass settings modal with three high-craft tabs: Timer duration adjustment, Pomodoro Focus/Break customizable intervals, and an interactive Alarm Sound test and apply panel with automatic resource cleanup.

Replaced top-right profile pill with a unified, high-craft Mana Pill dropdown trigger featuring a custom crystalline SVG with soft pulsing emerald glow. Resolved infinite loading spinner in TagAnalyticsWidget by checking data-sync loading state rather than empty data length, enabling a clean fallback to the empty state when no focus sessions are recorded. Added multi-user target analytics support to dynamically render correct tag distributions for friend profiles.
